CustomField.description: The editable HTML body of the email (the content inside the branded card). Authored via the rich-text editor on the Email Templates tab. Supports merge tokens ({SignerName}, {DocumentTitle}, {Message}, {ActionButton}, {VerificationCode}, etc.). The service wraps this in the branded header/footer chrome. Left blank falls back to the built-in default for the type.
CustomField.label: Body (HTML)
